nodes.name: When Executed by Another Workflow
nodes.notes: Input contract for caller workflows. Required: query. Optional: count, readTopN, readerDelaySeconds, maxContentChars, country, search_lang, ui_lang, freshness, safesearch.

nodes.name: Brave Web Search
nodes.notes: Uses an HTTP Header Auth credential. Header Name: X-Subscription-Token. Header Value: your Brave Search API key. Re-select your local credential after import if n8n shows a credential ID warning.

nodes.name: Jina Reader
nodes.notes: Free/no-key Reader path. Reads the current result URL using https://r.jina.ai/<target-url>.

parameters.content:
## Brave credential
Use an **HTTP Header Auth** credential.

Header Name: `X-Subscription-Token`
Header Value: your Brave Search API key.

After import, open **Brave Web Search** and re-select your local credential if needed.

## Reader controls
This version over-retrieves candidates from Brave, then reads only `readTopN` URLs with Jina Reader.

Defaults:
- `count`: 10 Brave candidates
- `readTopN`: 3 URLs
- `readerDelaySeconds`: 4 seconds between Reader calls
- `maxContentChars`: 6000 chars per page

Reranking is intentionally not enabled yet.

json.query: n8n execute sub-workflow trigger input data
